name: perl-modules-5.40
title: perl-modules-5.40
summary:
Core Perl modules
Architecture independent Perl modules.  These modules are part of Perl and
required if the `perl' package is installed.
.
Note that this package only exists to save archive space and should be
considered an internal implementation detail of the `perl' package.
Other packages should not depend on `perl-modules-5.40' directly, they
should use `perl' (which depends on `perl-modules-5.40') instead.

When the engagement is in the install phase, use perl-modules-5.40 as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair perl-modules-5.40 with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `perl-modules-5.40 --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
